name: HBB_beta_globin_cluster_chr11p15_5
description: Beta-globin gene cluster on 11p15.5, containing HBE1 - HBG2 - HBG1 - HBBP1 - HBD - HBB in tandem (~60 kb). HBG1 and HBG2 paralogs share >99% identity; HBD and HBB share ~93% identity; HBBP1 is a non-functional paralog. Recurrent gene-conversion and unequal crossover drives the many globin-disorder structural alleles (HPFH, Lepore, Kenya).

architecture.internal_structure: 5' HBE1 (epsilon) - HBG2 (gamma-G) - HBG1 (gamma-A) - HBBP1 (pseudogene) - HBD (delta) - HBB (beta) 3'; LCR (locus control region) at 5' end; very high paralog identity especially HBG1/HBG2.
